content.speakerText: I think digital literacy’s becoming the new baseline—like managing Slack, Zoom, and AI tools.
content.speakerTextCn: 我觉得数字素养正成为新底线，比如管理Slack、Zoom和AI工具。

options.text: Exactly! And emotional intelligence matters even more—you can’t read body language remotely.
I agree, but technical skills are all you need to succeed.
Tools are outdated; we should go back to office work.
Digital literacy is only important for IT staff.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了原观点并补充了更深层的能力——情绪智力，符合对话中‘对比两种能力，突出深层逻辑’的要求。干扰项1错误地简化了成功要素；干扰项2完全否定远程工作趋势；干扰项3错误地限制了数字素养的适用范围。

content.speakerText: How do you think remote work changes the way teams collaborate?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为远程工作如何改变团队协作方式？

options.text: Team members need stronger written communication skills and proactive updates.
People should avoid using email and only talk on the phone.
Collaboration is easier because everyone is in the same office.
Only managers need to adapt; employees don’t change their habits.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了远程协作中书面沟通和主动汇报的重要性，符合场景核心。干扰项1违背远程工作现实（不在同一办公室）；干扰项2提出不切实际的替代方案；干扰项3错误地将协作模式等同于办公室环境。

content.speakerText: What’s the biggest challenge for new hires in a fully remote company?
content.speakerTextCn: 在完全远程的公司里，新员工最大的挑战是什么？

options.text: Building trust and rapport without face-to-face interactions.
Finding a good coffee shop to work from.
Learning how to use a printer.
Getting paid in cash instead of direct deposit.

content.explanation: 正确答案���焦远程环境中建立信任和关系的核心挑战，符合未来技能主题。干扰项1-3都是无关或荒谬的选项，与职场能力无关，明显不符合语境。

content.template: I’d argue self-discipline is the real key—no one’s watching you ___.
content.hint: 强调远程工作缺乏监督的场景
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（no one’s watching you at home）

content.template: Remote work demands strong ___ communication skills because you can’t rely on tone or body language.
content.hint: 在没有面对面交流时，主要依赖哪种沟通形式？

content.template: To succeed remotely, you need to master digital tools and develop emotional ___ to understand colleagues’ feelings.
content.hint: 与‘emotional’搭配的高频职场术语，指理解他人情绪的能力

content.speakerText: I think digital literacy’s becoming the new baseline—like managing Slack, Zoom, and AI tools.
content.speakerTextCn: 我觉得数字素养正成为新底线，比如管理Slack、Zoom和AI工具。
expectedAnswers: Exactly! And emotional intelligence matters even more—you can’t read body language remotely.
I agree, but I’d add that self-discipline is crucial since you’re working alone.
You're right about tools, but the real challenge is staying motivated without team energy.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方观点并补充了另一个关键能力
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否使用场景关键词如emotional intelligence, self-discipline
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个场景核心能力词

content.speakerText: What’s one skill you think will be most important for workers in 2030?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为2030年对工作者来说最重要的技能是什么？
expectedAnswers: Adaptability—technology changes fast, and you need to keep learning new tools.
Remote collaboration skills, because hybrid work is here to stay.
Critical thinking, since AI will handle routine tasks, and humans need to make complex decisions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回答了关于未来技能的问题
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词搭配如‘keep learning’, ‘handle tasks’
表达自然度：是否使用口语化表达而非书面语，如‘here to stay’
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个未来技能关键词如adaptability, collaboration, critical thinking

content.speakerText: How can companies support employees in developing future-ready skills?
content.speakerTextCn: 公司如何帮助员工发展面向未来的能力？
expectedAnswers: By offering regular training on digital tools and emotional intelligence workshops.
Creating mentorship programs so new hires can learn from experienced remote workers.
Encouraging a culture of continuous learning with access to online courses and flexible hours.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提出具体可行的支持方式
语言准确性：是否使用正确动词如‘offering’, ‘creating’, ‘encouraging’
表达自然度：是否使用自然的职场表达如‘culture of continuous learning’
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个场景关键词如digital tools, emotional intelligence, mentorship
